title: Collaborative Editing
description: Real-time collaborative editing settings for multi-user notebook sessions with comprehensive CRDT synchronization, user presence awareness, and enterprise-grade access control.

enabled.title: Enable Collaborative Editing
enabled.description: Activate real-time collaborative editing capabilities for shared notebook sessions with CRDT-based conflict-free synchronization

serverUrl.title: Collaboration Server URL
serverUrl.description: WebSocket endpoint for Yjs collaboration server coordination (e.g., wss://collab.example.com/api/collab/ws)

storageBackend.title: Document Storage Backend
storageBackend.description: Backend storage system for collaborative document persistence, version history, and CRDT state management

synchronization.title: Real-time Synchronization Configuration
synchronization.description: Parameters controlling CRDT synchronization performance and conflict resolution behavior

conflictResolutionStrategy.title: Conflict Resolution Strategy
conflictResolutionStrategy.description: Primary strategy for resolving concurrent editing conflicts in collaborative sessions

syncLatencyTarget.title: Target Synchronization Latency (ms)
syncLatencyTarget.description: Target latency for real-time edit propagation across collaborative clients

batchingEnabled.title: Enable Operation Batching
batchingEnabled.description: Batch multiple rapid edits to reduce network overhead while maintaining responsiveness

batchingWindow.title: Batching Window (ms)
batchingWindow.description: Time window for batching multiple operations before transmission

heartbeatInterval.title: WebSocket Heartbeat Interval (ms)
heartbeatInterval.description: Interval for WebSocket ping/pong heartbeat to maintain connection health

sessionManagement.title: Collaborative Session Management
sessionManagement.description: Settings for managing multi-user collaborative editing sessions and participant coordination

maxUsersPerSession.title: Maximum Users Per Session
maxUsersPerSession.description: Maximum number of concurrent users allowed in a single collaborative session

sessionTimeout.title: Session Timeout (seconds)
sessionTimeout.description: Automatic session termination timeout for inactive collaborative sessions

userInactivityTimeout.title: User Inactivity Timeout (seconds)
userInactivityTimeout.description: Timeout for removing inactive users from collaborative session participant list

autoSaveInterval.title: Auto-save Interval (seconds)
autoSaveInterval.description: Frequency of automatic document snapshots during collaborative editing sessions

sessionRecoveryEnabled.title: Enable Session Recovery
sessionRecoveryEnabled.description: Allow automatic recovery of collaborative sessions after network interruptions

sessionRecoveryTimeout.title: Session Recovery Timeout (seconds)
sessionRecoveryTimeout.description: Maximum time to attempt session recovery before creating new session

awareness.title: User Presence and Awareness Configuration
awareness.description: Settings for real-time user presence tracking, cursor synchronization, and activity indicators

enabled.title: Enable User Presence Tracking
enabled.description: Track and display real-time user cursors, selections, and activity status

cursorSyncEnabled.title: Enable Cursor Synchronization
cursorSyncEnabled.description: Synchronize cursor positions and text selections across all participants

presenceUpdateInterval.title: Presence Update Interval (ms)
presenceUpdateInterval.description: Frequency of user presence information broadcasts

showUserNames.title: Show User Names
showUserNames.description: Display user names alongside presence indicators and cursors

showUserAvatars.title: Show User Avatars
showUserAvatars.description: Display user avatar images in presence indicators and collaboration bar

userColors.title: User Color Palette
userColors.description: Color palette for user-specific cursor and selection highlighting

activityTracking.title: Activity Tracking Settings
activityTracking.description: Configuration for user activity monitoring and status indicators

trackTyping.title: Track Typing Activity
trackTyping.description: Show typing indicators when users are actively editing

trackCellSelection.title: Track Cell Selection
trackCellSelection.description: Show which cells each user has selected or is focusing on

locking.title: Cell-Level Locking Configuration
locking.description: Settings for managing cell-level editing locks to prevent conflicting modifications

enabled.title: Enable Cell Locking
enabled.description: Allow users to acquire exclusive editing locks on individual cells

lockTimeout.title: Lock Timeout (milliseconds)
lockTimeout.description: Maximum duration for cell-level editing locks before automatic release

autoLockOnEdit.title: Auto-lock Cells During Edit
autoLockOnEdit.description: Automatically acquire cell locks when users begin editing cell content

showLockIndicators.title: Show Lock Indicators
showLockIndicators.description: Display visual indicators for locked cells including lock owner information

lockConflictResolution.title: Lock Conflict Resolution
lockConflictResolution.description: Strategy for handling lock conflicts when multiple users attempt to edit the same cell

comments.title: Collaborative Comments and Annotations
comments.description: Configuration for in-notebook comment system and collaborative review workflows

enabled.title: Enable Collaborative Comments
enabled.description: Allow users to create threaded comments and annotations within shared notebooks

allowAnonymousComments.title: Allow Anonymous Comments
allowAnonymousComments.description: Permit comments from users without explicit authentication (viewer role)

enableMentions.title: Enable @Mentions
enableMentions.description: Allow users to mention other participants using @username syntax

enableCommentNotifications.title: Enable Comment Notifications
enableCommentNotifications.description: Send notifications when new comments are added or users are mentioned

maxCommentLength.title: Maximum Comment Length
maxCommentLength.description: Maximum character limit for individual comment content

enableRichTextComments.title: Enable Rich Text Comments
enableRichTextComments.description: Allow formatting, links, and embedded content in comments

commentResolution.title: Comment Resolution Settings
commentResolution.description: Configuration for comment resolution workflow and tracking

enableResolution.title: Enable Comment Resolution
enableResolution.description: Allow comments to be marked as resolved

autoHideResolved.title: Auto-hide Resolved Comments
autoHideResolved.description: Automatically hide resolved comments from normal view

whoCanResolve.title: Who Can Resolve Comments
whoCanResolve.description: User roles allowed to mark comments as resolved

history.title: Version History and Change Tracking
history.description: Configuration for collaborative version history, change tracking, and rollback capabilities

enabled.title: Enable Version History Tracking
enabled.description: Maintain detailed version history with rollback capabilities for collaborative sessions

snapshotInterval.title: Snapshot Interval (minutes)
snapshotInterval.description: Frequency of automatic version snapshots during collaborative editing

maxHistoryVersions.title: Maximum History Versions
maxHistoryVersions.description: Maximum number of version history entries to retain per document

trackCellChanges.title: Track Individual Cell Changes
trackCellChanges.description: Maintain granular change history at the individual cell level

enableDiffVisualization.title: Enable Diff Visualization
enableDiffVisualization.description: Show visual diffs when browsing version history and changes

enableSelectiveRollback.title: Enable Selective Rollback
enableSelectiveRollback.description: Allow rolling back specific changes without affecting subsequent modifications

historyRetentionDays.title: History Retention (days)
historyRetentionDays.description: Number of days to retain version history before automatic cleanup

permissions.title: Role-based Access Control and Permissions
permissions.description: Configuration for user roles, permissions, and collaborative access control policies

enabled.title: Enable Permission Management
enabled.description: Activate role-based access control for collaborative sessions

defaultRole.title: Default User Role
defaultRole.description: Default role assigned to new participants joining collaborative sessions

allowPublicViewing.title: Allow Public Viewing
allowPublicViewing.description: Permit read-only access to collaborative sessions without authentication

requireApprovalForEditors.title: Require Approval for New Editors
requireApprovalForEditors.description: Require session owner approval before granting edit permissions to new users

enableGuestAccess.title: Enable Guest Access
enableGuestAccess.description: Allow temporary guest access with limited permissions

sessionOwnerPermissions.title: Session Owner Permissions
sessionOwnerPermissions.description: Permissions that only session owners can exercise

canChangePermissions.title: Can Change User Permissions
canChangePermissions.description: Allow session owner to modify user roles and permissions

canRemoveUsers.title: Can Remove Users
canRemoveUsers.description: Allow session owner to remove users from collaborative session

canTerminateSession.title: Can Terminate Session
canTerminateSession.description: Allow session owner to terminate collaborative session for all users

performance.title: Performance and Resource Management
performance.description: Configuration for optimizing collaborative editing performance and resource usage

enablePerformanceMonitoring.title: Enable Performance Monitoring
enablePerformanceMonitoring.description: Track and report performance metrics for collaborative editing operations

maxConcurrentOperations.title: Maximum Concurrent Operations
maxConcurrentOperations.description: Maximum number of simultaneous CRDT operations to process

operationQueueSize.title: Operation Queue Size
operationQueueSize.description: Maximum size of operation queue for handling bursts of activity

memoryUsageLimit.title: Memory Usage Limit (MB)
memoryUsageLimit.description: Maximum memory allocation for collaborative editing features

enableGarbageCollection.title: Enable Automatic Garbage Collection
enableGarbageCollection.description: Automatically clean up unused collaborative state and history

gcInterval.title: Garbage Collection Interval (minutes)
gcInterval.description: Frequency of automatic garbage collection for collaborative state

ui.title: User Interface and Experience Configuration
ui.description: Settings for collaborative editing UI components, notifications, and user experience

showCollaborationBar.title: Show Collaboration Status Bar
showCollaborationBar.description: Display the main collaboration control panel and status indicators

collaborationBarPosition.title: Collaboration Bar Position
collaborationBarPosition.description: Position of the collaboration status bar within the interface

showPresenceIndicators.title: Show Presence Indicators
showPresenceIndicators.description: Display real-time presence indicators and user cursors

showActivityFeed.title: Show Activity Feed
showActivityFeed.description: Display live activity feed of collaborative actions and events

enableNotifications.title: Enable Notifications
enableNotifications.description: Show browser notifications for collaborative events and mentions

notificationTypes.title: Notification Types
notificationTypes.description: Types of collaborative events that trigger notifications

themes.title: Collaboration Theme Settings
themes.description: Visual theme configuration for collaborative editing elements

useSystemTheme.title: Use System Theme
useSystemTheme.description: Automatically adapt collaboration UI to system light/dark theme

cursorOpacity.title: Cursor Opacity
cursorOpacity.description: Opacity level for remote user cursors (0.0 to 1.0)

selectionOpacity.title: Selection Opacity
selectionOpacity.description: Opacity level for remote user text selections (0.0 to 1.0)

debugging.title: Debugging and Development Configuration
debugging.description: Settings for debugging collaborative editing features and troubleshooting issues

enableDebugLogging.title: Enable Debug Logging
enableDebugLogging.description: Enable detailed console logging for collaborative editing operations

logLevel.title: Log Level
logLevel.description: Verbosity level for collaborative editing logs

enableNetworkLogging.title: Enable Network Logging
enableNetworkLogging.description: Log WebSocket messages and network operations for debugging

enablePerformanceProfiler.title: Enable Performance Profiler
enablePerformanceProfiler.description: Profile and log performance metrics for collaborative operations

enableErrorReporting.title: Enable Error Reporting
enableErrorReporting.description: Automatically report collaboration errors for debugging
